channel.title: Greg Getner — Blog
channel.description: Field notes from 23 years of ActiveCampaign consulting: automations, deliverability, retention, and the expensive mistakes most operators keep making.

item.title: 5 ActiveCampaign Automation Mistakes That Kill Conversions
item.author: greg@getner.ai (Greg Getner)
item.description: The five ActiveCampaign automation mistakes I find in nearly every audit — goal exits, tag cancer, no-reply senders, dead contact blasts, and pacing problems — and the specific fixes that recover the conversions they quietly bleed.
